arts.ttl: Vaclav Cerny teased by Lyon star over horror miss as Steaua chief to 'coach' Rangers' rivals from BED - Ibrox Euro bulletin
arts.sum: The Czech loan man squandered a glorious chance to open the scoring against the French - as Gers next rivals in good nick

arts.ttl: Clinton Mata and Nemanja Matić to miss Lyon’s upcoming match against Nantes
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, Clinton Mata (31) and Nemanja Matić (36) are expected to miss Lyon’s upcoming match against Nantes in Ligue 1 through injury. The pair are sidelined following injuries sustained…
